caption: A man wearing a green baseball cap, black headphones, and a green t-shirt with the white text "YOU NEVER DO SHIT" is seated in a room that appears to be a studio or a store. He is positioned behind a professional black microphone. Behind him, the wall is decorated with numerous framed photographs, and a white mannequin wearing a white garment stands to his left. Clothing racks are visible in the background. Two red and white logos appear on the screen, one on the left and one on the right, with the latter containing the text "HOT". Throughout the sequence, the man remains in the same position, smiling and speaking while glancing slightly to his left. His facial expression shifts slightly as he talks, and he occasionally blinks or moves his head, but the overall setting and his posture remain constant.
